open.title: Door Open
open.description: Whether the door is currently open.

doorOpenCounter.title: Door Open Counter
doorOpenCounter.description: Cumulative count of door open events.

alarmCounter.title: Alarm Counter
alarmCounter.description: Cumulative count of door alarms triggered.

alarmTime.title: Alarm Time
alarmTime.description: Duration in seconds the door was open when the alarm triggered. Only present in door alarm events.
